business.name: Trillium Massage
business.tagline: Let the spa come to you

content.serviceAreaBlurb: Trillium is based out of Westchester, but happy to travel to the LA area in general. Very close locations include Playa Vista, Mar Vista, Santa Monica, Venice, El Segundo, Torrance, and Culver City.

hero.headline: Relax, Restore, Rejuvenate
hero.subheading: Let the spa come to you
hero.description: Spa level massage therapy in your home, at your convenience.

about.bio: Trillium is a massage therapist with 10 years of experience. Working in the LA Metro Area, Trillium found success in specializing in In-Home mobile massage therapy, working solo and through platforms like Soothe and Zeel since 2016.
about.focus: Combining relaxation and pain relief techniques, Trillium provides you with effective massage therapy from the comfort of your own home.
about.stats: With more than 3,000 in-home massage therapy sessions, Trillium has maintained a
about.statsClose: , reflecting the quality and care he puts into his work.

footer.blurb: Providing professional massage therapy services to help you relax, rejuvenate, and restore your body and mind.
